meta_title: Private GP Home Visits in Preston & Fulwood | Same Day
meta_description: Private GP home visits across Fulwood and Preston. By appointment, at a time that suits you. Same clinical standard as a clinic visit. Dr Faizal Secretary. From £119.
hero_h1: Private GP Home Visits in Preston & Fulwood
hero_sub: Private GP home visits across Fulwood and Preston — by appointment, at a time that suits you.
hero_trust: From £119 · Fulwood & Central Preston · By Appointment
intro_quote: You're unwell enough to need a doctor. Not well enough to get to one.
intro_heading: Home Visit GP in Fulwood, Preston
intro_para_1: For patients who are too unwell to travel, housebound, or simply prefer to be seen at home — Dr Faizal Secretary will come to you.
intro_para_2: Home visits carry the same clinical standard as a clinic appointment. The same doctor. The same thorough assessment. The same prescription and referral writing, if needed.

faqs.question: What areas do you cover for home visits?
faqs.answer: Fulwood and central Preston. Please call us to confirm if you are outside this area — we may still be able to help.

faqs.question: How much does a home visit cost?
faqs.answer: Home visits start from £119 within Fulwood and central Preston. Further distances may incur an additional charge — please call to discuss.

faqs.question: How do I book a home visit?
faqs.answer: Call or WhatsApp us on 07424 172034. We'll confirm availability and a suitable time.

faqs.question: What can be treated during a home visit?
faqs.answer: Most general medical conditions can be assessed during a home visit. The doctor will advise if clinic attendance or emergency services are more appropriate.
